ModMetaData.name: Tiered Gravship Shields
ModMetaData.author: JalapenoLabs
ModMetaData.description: Adds tier 2 and tier 3 gravship shield generators — more powerful upgrades for your gravship's defensive systems. The vanilla shield generator becomes tier 1. Tier 2 has twice the shield capacity and tier 3 has four times, at the cost of proportionally higher power draw.\n\nHigher-tier shields are obtainable only as rare quest rewards.
